- **No P0/P1/P2 findings.** One P3 cosmetic note: the generated `changed-file-scope.json` dual-lists a session-handoff doc as both untracked-implementation and unrelated-dirty, but it's correctly excluded from the pack's required files — no scope, boundary, or validation impact.

(1) Scope consistency: the deliverable distribution {test:8,contract:2,implementation:17,security_audit:4,ui:5,claude_review:2,failure_recovery:2} and micro-title distribution {Secondary Workflow Slice:4,Permission And Audit Binding:22,Synthetic Fixture Set:14} each total 40 and match exactly across registry.js EXTERNAL_INTEGRATIONS_I_CP671_REQUIREMENTS, the review baseline included_units, the manifest plan_binding_snapshot, and both contract files. (2) Implementation: service.js builds the CP671 case-set/descriptor/Hermes/Claude/handoff with all runtimes closed; validators.js enforces descriptor_only, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only, raw_payload_included=false, deny cross-tenant, persistence no-write, and claude_is_final_approval=false; the contract projection advances current_pack/generated_from_pack_id to CP00-671 with CP666-670 as history; index.js re-exports the full surface. (3) Tests: model.test.js asserts CP671 coverage, descriptor boundaries (permission/audit/fixture closed, external_api_runtime_opened=false, handoff to CP00-672/RP22.P02.M06.S15), and projection equality against both contract files. (4) No-write/no-real-data: freezeCp671Result + CP666_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION assert synthetic_only/no_real_data and no token/secret/credential persistence; a secret scan of the implementation surface returned only boolean *:false flags, no real values. (5) Authority/Hermes boundary: Claude stays read_only and non-final (promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, blocks_pack_on_p0_p1_p2=true, allowed tools Read/Grep/Glob); Hermes is used only as an H22 evidence-packet descriptor (hermes_runtime_opened=false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, runtime_receipt_emitted=false), not product runtime.
